final_prompt.prompt:
Create a panoramic scroll illustration of the Tang Dynasty Chang'an Lantern Festival.

Style/medium: must be 工笔重彩长卷 — references in the spirit of 唐代壁画 tomb painting tradition, 张萱/周昉 court figure painting heritage, 清明上河图 scroll narrative structure; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a horizontal scroll format capturing the panoramic cityscape
Subject: must include thousands of lanterns illuminating the night sky, the lantern festival atmosphere of 唐代长安城
Scene/backdrop: must include the cityscape of 唐代长安城 at night during the Lantern Festival
Lighting/mood: needs a luminous night festival atmosphere with lantern glow — exact light distribution is yours
Color palette: must be rich and saturated as per 工笔重彩 tradition
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
